creator: keramida@ceid.upatras.gr
text:
From: Phuoc Nguyen <vungtau@hotmail.com>
Subject: conf/29066: Can not configure XFree86 Server for ATI Rage Fury Pro 32MB AGP
Date: Wed, Jul 18, 2001 at 10:41:19AM -0700

> 
> >Number:         29066
> >Category:       conf
> >Synopsis:       Can not configure XFree86 Server for ATI Rage Fury Pro 32MB AGP

> >Description:
> I can not configure XFree86 Server for my ATI Rage Fury Pro 32MB AGP
> Video Card.  I had tried many ATI card names but it does not work!
>
> Please let me know how I can fix it or what is the name of the ATI
> card I should choose.

Please do not send questions like this with send-pr(1).
Mail your questions to <freebsd-questions@freebsd.org>.

This is not a bug of FreeBSD, but a configuration question related to
your installation.

-giorgos
